title: Our Programs

hero.heading: Real Work. Real Skills. Real Futures.
hero.subheading: Juma combines employment, job training, financial capability, and career pathway support to help young people break the cycle of poverty.

intro: 5 million young people nationally are disconnected from school and work. Juma is changing that.

pillars.title: Earn
pillars.body: Youth earn real paychecks at Juma's social enterprises across San Francisco, San Jose, Seattle, and Sacramento — working at major league sports venues and other local businesses — gaining hands-on experience in customer service, sales, and business operations. 462 youth employed in 2025 / 53,475 hours worked.

pillars.title: Learn
pillars.body: 186 workshops in 2025 covering job skills, financial literacy, and career development. Youth complete mock interviews, build resumes, take career tours, and create personal Launch Plans for their futures. In 2025, youth reported significant improvement in Workplace Communication (92%), Customer Service (90%), and Critical Thinking (85%).

pillars.title: Connect
pillars.body: In 2025, Juma re-launched the Connect pillar with individualized coaching to help youth navigate life transitions. The new Juma Blueprint supports young people in aligning their aspirations with actionable steps toward education, employment, and entrepreneurship. Ongoing alumni and wraparound support.

sections.heading: Employment is more than a paycheck.
sections.body:
Work provides dignity, stability, and a path forward. Research shows that early work experience — paired with financial education and mentorship — helps young people escape poverty and build lasting careers.

Our goal: every Juma youth reaches age 25 on a trajectory toward living-wage employment and economic prosperity.

sections.heading: Where belonging and growth go hand in hand.
sections.body:
A positive, connected workplace culture is part of what makes the program work.

- 99% of youth report they enjoy coming to their Juma job most days
- 98% report feeling connected to at least one peer at Juma
- 90% report feeling connected to at least one adult at Juma
- 90% report significant improvement in their teamwork skills

sections.heading: I was working hard, putting in my sweat equity, while building resiliency and the mindset that there are no shortcuts to success — and hard work is integral to success.

seoDescription: Juma's YouthConnect program combines real employment, job training, financial capability, and career pathway support to help young people break the cycle of poverty.
